text: The subject is externally focused on visual information, suppressing internal narrative.
confidence: High confidence; would lower if DMN activation rose or if other networks dropped.
cite: Smallwood et al. 2021, Nat. Rev. Neurosci.
raw:
The subject is externally focused on visual information, suppressing internal narrative.
High confidence; would lower if DMN activation rose or if other networks dropped.
